name: VisionBoard (Python 3.12 + uv)
postCreateCommand: curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh && echo 'export PATH=$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH' >> ~/.bashrc && export PATH=$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH && uv sync

postAttachCommand.server: export PATH=$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH && uv run uvicorn backend.app:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload

ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.description: Anthropic API key for Claude (required for image analysis)
